text: Okay Juliet, I have got the repo set up. Private GitHub, encrypted with our shared key.
Perfect. I am pushing the schema translation module now. I called it balcony, our little inside joke.
I love it. The Balcony App. Let me wire up the mesh routing layer on top.
Romeo, look at this. The latency benchmarks are incredible. Sub-millisecond schema translation.
We should show this to Professor Lawrence. He always said the two approaches were complementary.
